author: w3Lb
content: Plan: standard patch-bump runbook — 0.3.1 -> 0.3.2 (5 strings in root Cargo.toml via ripsed), CHANGELOG [Unreleased] -> [0.3.2] - 2026-06-10, refresh Cargo.lock, verify (full tests, clippy, fmt, plus the new semver gate locally for all four crates), single commit. Patch bump correct: one bug fix (#116 Windows streaming persist), no API changes.
